title: [codereview] RollcallResource uses undefined BAD_REQUEST in some paths and missing asyncio import check
description: In render_post and render_get, BAD_REQUEST is used but import is under aiocoap. Also, get_running_loop() requires import asyncio which is present but review for thread safety in demo. Tag: codereview
close_reason: All codereview findings fixed in 3 clean passes after edits, ruff, mypy. Conference demo resources now complete with LCI+SenML support for rollcall, position, etc.
